subcodes.first_line: O ye two souls enraptured by the countenance of the Beloved of all mankind! Though ye were unable to remain in Qum, yet praise be to God, in Juybar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مفتون روی دلبر آفاق هر چند در قم اقامت نتوانستید ولی الحمد لله در جویبار
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
